title: Rolson 60335 Helping Hand with 60 mm Magnifying Glass
features: An indispensible aid for modellers and arts and craft enthusiasts
Strong crocodile clips to hold the work piece

description: From the manufacturer 3 LED Super Bright Dyno Torch 3 LED Dyno Torch Black/ Red Super bright 3 LED 13000mcd. Soft rubber finish with simple push switch. One minute of winding can generate up to 7 - 8 minutes of bright light. Supplied with wrist strap
